positive: A stylized and symmetrical minimalist depiction of a celestial forest and moon cycle. The scene features interconnected, geometric silhouettes of stylized bioluminescent flora and branching root systems against a gradient nebula backdrop. Primary colors are deep indigo, electric cyan, and soft cosmic lavender, accented by bright, pure white glow points. The composition is centered, highly scalable for apparel, with clean lines and strong contrast between the solid black silhouettes and the glowing celestial elements. High contrast, flat graphic design aesthetic, vector illustration style, symmetrical composition, spiritual, transcendental.
negative: blur, low detail, noisy, grainy, artifacts, text, signature, logo, watermark, copyright, messy, crowded, extra limbs, mutated hands, bad anatomy, realistic photography, photorealism, grimy
